components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Torid, Mutalist Cernos, and Pox being unable to deal damage with their radial attack. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1322604-torid-mutalist-cernos-and-pox-lost-their-radial-attacks-investigating/?ct=1664217549

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Torid and Pox missing their ‘Embed Damage Radius’ and ‘Embed Time’ stats.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed embedded Torid projectiles getting destroyed by incoming damage like an electrical Status Effect.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Torid Toxin grenades dealing self-damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.7.2 + 25.7.2.1
patchlogs.additions: Fixed Zealot Heralds Torid FX perpetually lingering, thus affecting performance.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Torid and Pox not dealing radial Damage over time when its projectile lands on the ground or otherwise not on an enemy.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Hotfix 19.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed lingering Torid projectiles causing self-damage after Hall of Mirrors wears off.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Adhesive Blast causing the Zarr, Penta, Tonkor, Torid, Secura Penta, and Ogris’ projectile sound to not play.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed Torid not applying energy color correctly on certain FX.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: * Restored Torid’s 20% base status chance.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Torid not dealing DOT damage to impacted target as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/379733-bug-torid-enemies-hit-directly-not-damaged-by-clouds-3-months-old/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash that would occur when Mirage used Hall of Mirrors with a Torid equipped as a client.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Changed Critical Chance logic by allowing it to occur on Radial Explosions (both friendly and enemy where applicable). This fixes an issue with the Torid’s gas cloud not allowing for Criticals.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes reported cases of clients not being able to damage enemies caught in Vortex when using the Ogris, Torid, etc.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Torid in the Foundry not appearing correctly.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.5.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Torid Changes:
Increased Torid’s ammo capacity to 60.
Increased the critical chance on the Torid to 15% and the chance to proc its effect to 20%.
Firestorm mods will now affect Torid gas clouds.
Fixed the visual effects appearing incorrectly on the Torid.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.5.0.1 + 14.5.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: • Tweaked Torid’s visual damage range.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance on the Torid and Drakgoon Effects.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.7.0 + 13.7.0.1: Depths Of The Void
patchlogs.changes: Improved the performance of the Torid on low end computers.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Torid not gaining bonuses from elemental mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.7.1: Double Resource Weekend!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Torid and Nyx’s Absorb causing a game hang.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.6.0: The Vectis!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed game-hangs when shooting Absorb bubble with Torid (and possibly other projectile weapons).

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Torid gas cloud not appearing when the projectile hits and kills an enemy.
Fixed Torid gas cloud damage radius, which was larger than the actual visible cloud.
Fixed Torid elemental damage not being affected by armor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Torid’s cloud not using energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Serration mod not affecting Torid damage

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated reload sound effects for Snipetron, Snipetron Vandal, and Torid

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.4: Double Affinity Weekend!
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for killing blows with OGris or Torid affecting resource drops for client. Further stability to replicated drops has been added.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced particle fx on Torid.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sobek and Torid weapons so that they can be fired when coming out of a sprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.2: Tenno Reinforcement
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Torid gas clouds not receiving damage buffs from mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Torid rockets detonating immediately after firing.
